It features three connected phase boxes with arrows showing progression, and includes structured sections below each phase to detail specific deliverables, tasks, or activities. This format is ideal for project planning presentations, strategic roadmaps, or implementation timelines where clear phase dependencies and detailed breakdowns are essential for stakeholder communication.

name: Numbered steps with details
description: This slide template displays a numbered step-by-step process using a horizontal timeline format with three progressive stages. Each step is represented by a numbered circle with accompanying text placeholders below for detailed descriptions. It's ideal for presenting sequential workflows, project phases, or instructional processes where each stage builds upon the previous one.

name: 3 Steps, simple
description: This simple three-step process template presents a clean, ascending stair-step layout ideal for breaking down procedures, workflows, or sequential instructions. The minimalist design with placeholder text boxes allows for easy customization of step descriptions and is perfect for training materials, process documentation, or instructional presentations where clarity and simplicity are essential.

name: 4 Steps with key takeaways
description: This slide template presents a four-step process using a staircase or ascending step diagram format, with each step labeled and accompanied by key takeaways or supporting information. It's designed for presentations that need to illustrate sequential progression, process workflows, or building upon previous concepts where each step leads logically to the next. The template is ideal for strategic planning presentations, project roadmaps, or training materials that require clear visualization of multi-stage processes.

name: More steps with key takeaways – w/o borders for easier editing (delete from bottom to remove steps)
description: This is a stepped bar chart template designed to illustrate progressive stages or phases in a process, with each step building upon the previous one in an ascending format. The template features customizable steps with space for key takeaways or descriptions, and includes editable borders that can be easily removed. It's ideal for presenting sequential processes, milestone achievements, or cumulative progress in business presentations and strategic planning documents.

name: Steps with key takeaways – w/o borders for easier editing, and with icons. Contrast style
description: This slide template presents a step-by-step progression using ascending blocks in a vibrant purple gradient design, making it ideal for showcasing sequential processes or milestone achievements. The template includes placeholder text for key takeaways and space for icons, with a borderless design that facilitates easy customization. It's perfect for business presentations, project timelines, or educational content where you need to illustrate growth, progress, or sequential learning objectives.

name: Multi-workstream Gantt-style project timeline
description: This slide template displays a multi-workstream Gantt chart for project timeline management, showing different project phases or workstreams represented by horizontal blue bars across a timeline grid. It's designed for project managers and teams to visualize overlapping tasks, dependencies, and overall project scheduling across multiple parallel work tracks. The template is ideal for project planning presentations, status updates, and stakeholder communications where timing coordination between different workstreams is critical.

name: Large Gantt-style project timeline with responsible and status and current date
description: This template provides a comprehensive Gantt chart for project management, displaying task timelines with visual bars, responsible team members, and project status indicators. The template includes a current date marker to track progress against planned schedules and allows for easy identification of task ownership and completion status. It's ideal for project managers who need to present detailed project timelines, track accountability, and communicate project status to stakeholders or team members.

name: Simple workstream status tracker
description: This slide presents a simple workstream status tracker template for project management and team coordination. It displays multiple workstream categories with corresponding status indicators using colored dots (red, yellow, green) to represent different completion or progress states. The template is ideal for executive dashboards, team meetings, or project reviews where stakeholders need a quick visual overview of multiple work streams' current status.

name: Progress tracker with traffic lights and blockers
description: This progress tracker template uses a traffic light color-coding system (red, yellow, green) to visually indicate the status of multiple projects or tasks. It includes columns for tracking progress details and identifying blockers that may impede completion. This template is ideal for project managers and teams who need to quickly assess project health and address potential roadblocks during status meetings or reviews.

name: Status or progress tracker with traffic lights and blockers. G,Y, R added for accessibility
description: This slide template provides a project status tracking system using traffic light indicators (green, yellow, red) with accessibility enhancements. It displays multiple project items with their current status, progress indicators, and identifies any blockers or issues. This template is ideal for project managers and teams to communicate project health, progress updates, and risk areas in executive dashboards or status meetings.

name: Large project timeline with responsible, status and details
description: This template displays a comprehensive project timeline in a table format that tracks multiple project tasks or phases. It includes columns for responsible parties, status indicators (shown with colored dots), and detailed project information, making it ideal for program management and stakeholder reporting. The layout is designed for presenting complex project schedules where accountability, current status, and task details need to be communicated clearly to teams and leadership.

name: RACI
description: This RACI matrix template helps teams clearly define roles and responsibilities for project tasks or processes. It features a structured grid format where team members or stakeholders are listed across columns and activities/deliverables down rows, with color-coded indicators showing whether each person is Responsible, Accountable, Consulted, or Informed. This template is ideal for project planning, process documentation, and ensuring clear accountability across cross-functional teams.

name: Progress tracker with completion ratio – with Harvey ball icons
description: This slide template provides a visual progress tracking system that displays project or task completion ratios using Harvey ball icons (circular progress indicators). The template features a structured table format with columns for tracking different elements alongside their completion status, making it ideal for project status reports, milestone tracking, or performance dashboards. The Harvey ball icons offer an intuitive way to quickly communicate progress levels at a glance.

name: Status tracker – with arrow for KPI having moved up or down
description: This slide template provides a status tracking table designed to monitor key performance indicators (KPIs) with visual arrows indicating directional movement (up or down). The table includes columns for different metrics, their current status, and trend indicators to show performance changes over time. It's ideal for executive dashboards, project reviews, or regular business performance meetings where stakeholders need to quickly assess KPI trends and status updates.

name: Generic user, customer, or employee profile
description: This is a generic profile template designed to display basic information about users, customers, or employees. The slide features a clean layout with a profile icon on the left and structured data fields on the right for essential details. It's ideal for presentations involving team introductions, customer showcases, or organizational charts where standardized profile information needs to be presented clearly.

name: Minimalist table
description: This slide template features a clean, minimalist table design for presenting structured data or information in a clear, organized format. The simple layout includes column headers and rows with placeholder content, making it suitable for displaying financial data, project timelines, comparison charts, or any tabular information. It's ideal for business presentations where clarity and readability are prioritized over decorative elements.

name: Minimalist table with header, highlight and key takeaway
description: This minimalist table template features a clean, professional design with a header row, highlighted key data points, and space for summarizing important takeaways. The template is ideal for presenting structured data, metrics, or comparative information in business presentations, reports, or analytical summaries. Its streamlined format ensures focus remains on the essential data while maintaining visual clarity and readability.

name: Table with trackers
description: This slide template features a structured data table with tracking capabilities, designed for organizing and monitoring information across multiple categories or time periods. The table includes predefined column headers and rows with placeholder content, making it suitable for project tracking, performance metrics, or status reporting. It's ideal for presentations where systematic data comparison and progress monitoring are essential.

name: Table with trackers and bar chart for key data
description: This slide template combines a data table with an integrated horizontal bar chart to visualize key metrics and performance indicators. The left side displays structured data in rows and columns with numerical values, while the right side presents the same information as proportional blue bars for easy visual comparison. It's ideal for presenting quarterly results, KPI dashboards, or comparative analysis where both detailed numbers and visual trends need to be communicated simultaneously.

name: Data table, boxy style
description: This presentation slide features a clean, structured data table with a boxy design style that includes clear column headers and organized rows of information. The template is ideal for presenting comparative data, statistics, or any tabular information in a professional business or academic setting. It provides a straightforward way to display multiple data points across different categories in an easy-to-read format.

name: Data table with sum-total
description: This slide template features a structured data table with columns for displaying quantitative information and includes a sum-total row for numerical calculations. The template uses a professional blue header design with white data cells arranged in a clean grid format. It's ideal for presenting financial data, budget breakdowns, performance metrics, or any dataset that requires column totals and organized tabular presentation.

name: KPI table
description: This template presents a structured KPI (Key Performance Indicator) table for tracking and displaying business metrics across different time periods. The format features a clean tabular layout with color-coded headers and rows for easy data categorization and comparison. It's ideal for executive dashboards, performance reviews, and regular business reporting where multiple KPIs need to be monitored and compared over time.

name: Performance eval table, withqualitative flags
description: This presentation slide template displays a performance evaluation table that incorporates qualitative assessment flags or indicators alongside quantitative metrics. The template is designed for organizational performance reviews, project assessments, or dashboard reporting where both numerical data and qualitative status indicators (such as color-coded flags or symbols) need to be presented together. It would be ideal for management presentations, team reviews, or stakeholder reports requiring a comprehensive view of performance across multiple criteria or time periods.

name: Main KPIs snapshot with trend and thresholds
description: This slide template is designed for presenting key performance indicators (KPIs) in a visual dashboard format with trend analysis and performance thresholds. The layout features six colored rectangular sections (blue, green, red, and yellow) that can display different KPI metrics along with their current status and directional trends. It's ideal for executive summaries, performance reviews, or regular business reporting where stakeholders need a quick overview of critical metrics and their performance against established benchmarks.

name: Main KPIs snapshot with trend, thresholds and descriptions
description: This slide template provides a dashboard-style overview of key performance indicators (KPIs) with visual trend indicators and performance status. Each KPI is displayed in colored tiles (green, orange, red) that likely represent performance thresholds or status levels, along with trend arrows and descriptive text. It's designed for executive reporting and performance monitoring presentations where stakeholders need a quick visual assessment of multiple critical metrics.

name: Detailed KPI tracking
description: This slide template presents a comprehensive KPI tracking dashboard designed to monitor multiple performance indicators across different categories or time periods. It features a structured layout with color-coded metrics, progress bars, and status indicators that enable teams to quickly assess performance against targets. This template is ideal for executive reporting, project management reviews, or departmental performance meetings where stakeholders need a clear overview of key business metrics and their current status.

name: OKR table, colorful
description: This slide template provides a colorful table format for displaying Objectives and Key Results (OKRs) in an organized, visually appealing way. The template features multiple colored rows and columns that allow teams to categorize and track different objectives, key results, and their progress status using distinct color coding. It's ideal for quarterly business reviews, team meetings, or strategic planning sessions where clear visual representation of OKR progress and priorities is needed.

name: Heatmap
description: This slide template displays a heatmap visualization using a blue color gradient to represent data intensity across different categories and time periods or variables. The template is designed to show patterns, correlations, or performance metrics in a matrix format where darker shades indicate higher values or stronger relationships. It's ideal for presenting comparative data analysis, performance tracking, or identifying trends across multiple dimensions in business reports and analytical presentations.

name: Cross comparison table with data
description: This slide template features a cross-comparison table designed to systematically compare multiple items, products, or concepts across various criteria or attributes. The table uses a clean grid format with placeholder text, making it ideal for presenting detailed comparisons, feature analysis, or evaluation matrices. It's commonly used in business presentations, product reviews, competitive analysis, or decision-making processes where stakeholders need to evaluate options side-by-side.

name: Reasoning on the left, chart with quantitative impact on the right
description: This slide template provides a structured layout for presenting analytical findings with supporting rationale on the left side and quantitative data visualization on the right. It features a text area for detailed reasoning, assumptions, or methodology alongside a bar chart displaying numerical results or metrics. This format is ideal for business presentations, research reports, or strategic reviews where you need to explain the logic behind your analysis while simultaneously showing measurable outcomes or impacts.

name: Two related metrics represented with bar charts
description: This slide template demonstrates how to visualize two related metrics using bar chart formats. It features side-by-side bar charts that allow for easy comparison of connected data sets, with one showing a simple two-bar comparison and the other displaying a five-bar trend or category breakdown. This template is ideal for presenting comparative analytics, performance metrics, or any scenario where two complementary data stories need to be told together in a clear, visual format.

name: Country flags as visual entry points – limit to known flags
description: This slide template demonstrates the use of country flags as visual entry points in data visualization, with the caveat to limit usage to well-known flags. It features a horizontal bar chart on the left showing data by country with corresponding flag icons, and a vertical bar chart on the right displaying the same data in a different format. The template is designed for international business presentations, market analysis, or demographic reports where country-specific data needs to be communicated clearly to global audiences.

name: Funnel chart with explanation on the right
description: This slide template features a funnel chart visualization positioned on the left side with dedicated space for explanatory content on the right. It's designed for presenting sequential data, conversion processes, or step-by-step analyses where each stage needs detailed explanation. Ideal for sales funnels, process workflows, or any scenario requiring both visual data representation and comprehensive descriptive text.

name: Clustering countries with flags – use when flags are recognizable and geographic position doesn’t matter
description: This slide template demonstrates how to group countries using flag icons when visual flag recognition is more important than geographic positioning. It shows a clustered arrangement of multiple country flags organized in rows, making it suitable for presentations where countries need to be categorized by criteria other than location, such as trade partnerships, economic development levels, or policy alignments. This layout is ideal for international business, policy analysis, or comparative studies where flag identification aids audience understanding.
